contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Onboarding invitation email handler (Seth voice, names the inviter)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/328
  
  Details:
  Onboarding invitation email (Seth voice, names the inviter) — tokenomics#328, 2026-05-29.
  
  Gary asked: when a governor uses dapp/governor_contributor_admin.html to onboard a new contributor, send the contributor an invitation from admin@truesight.me with the next step (create_signature.html) + a short intro context link. Operator constraints: Seth Godin voice, name who extended the invitation.
  
  PR delivered:
  
  1. tokenomics#328 — New GAS handler edgar_send_onboarding_invitation.gs in scriptId 1m8IZPs1 (owner_email admin@truesight.me, same Apps Script project as the existing email-verification webhook so the From line is consistent). Dispatcher wired in edgar_send_email_verification.gs: doGet routes action=sendOnboardingInvitation to the new handler; doPost dispatches on a JSON `action` field with backward-compat default. composeOnboardingSubject_('<Inviter> added you to TrueSight DAO'). composeOnboardingBody_ follows the CMO_SETH_GODIN.md lens — smallest viable audience (grassroots contributors burned by crypto-bro maximalism), tribe signal ('Not a wallet. Not gas. Not crypto in the way you have been told it has to be'), single primary action (signature link with email pre-filled), context links (edgar.html + whitepaper) deliberately deprioritised so they don't compete for the first click. inviter_name is a required field — handler errors if missing. inviter_email becomes the Reply-To if present. TEST_sendOnboardingInvitation() + editorDryRunOnboardingInvitation() editor helpers. Manifest auto-regenerated; new file bound to 1m8IZPs1 via header-URL.
  
  No clasp push in this PR per Gary's constraint that admin@-pinned scriptIds always deploy as admin@. Operator pushes from his laptop with cp ~/.clasprc-admin.json ~/.clasprc.json + deploy_gas_project.py --push; PR-1g identity check enforces owner_email == admin@truesight.me.
  
  Edgar-side dispatch (sentiment_importer call to the new /exec action when a governor adds a contributor) is a separate follow-up PR.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
